name: PLAN0 AI
long_description:
PLAN0 is building the Bloomberg of construction for real estate developers, investors, and general contractors — $20B of projects are already running through the platform.

We analyze architectural plans using computer vision AI models to generate detailed cost estimates and analytics in minutes. The platform also learns from historical localized project data aggregated through industry partnerships — capturing cost overruns, delays, and inefficiencies — to help stakeholders design and price new buildings more effectively from the start.
one_liner: AI native construction cost estimation & analytics.
